label: DE.CM-09
definition: Computing hardware and software, runtime environments, and their data are monitored to find potentially adverse events

label: ID.AM-01
definition: Inventories of hardware managed by the organization are maintained

label: ID.AM-02
definition: Inventories of software, services, and systems managed by the organization are maintained

label: ID.IM-03
definition: Improvements are identified from execution of operational processes, procedures, and activities

label: ID.RA-01
definition: Vulnerabilities in assets are identified, validated, and recorded

label: ID.RA-05
definition: Threats, vulnerabilities, likelihoods, and impacts are used to understand inherent risk and inform risk response prioritization

label: ID.RA-06
definition: Risk responses are chosen, prioritized, planned, tracked, and communicated

label: PR.PS-02
definition: Software is maintained, replaced, and removed commensurate with risk
